name: Kat Courtney
title: Founder of Plant Medicine People, Co-founder of Basse, and a Death Doula
shortBio: Kat Courtney is a pioneer in the modern day Plant Medicine space; she is a traditionally trained Ayahuasquera and Huachumera with over 2 decades of professional psychedelic experience. Kat apprenticed for over 10 years in the Shipibo-Conibo and Quechua-Lamista traditions. She is the author of Plant Medicine Mystery School Vol 1. Kat is a trailblazer in the Psychedelic Integration space and a certified Death Doula.
talkingPoints:
- Kat apprenticed in traditional lineages for over a decade including drinking ayahuasca for 30 consecutive nights.
- The difference between plant consciousness and human consciousness and how this shift can quiet anxiety and addiction.
- What ego dissolution actually is and why grounded integration matters more than peak experiences.
- What is shadow work and how to begin with or without plant medicine.
- How to choose ethical safe plant medicine facilitators and what red flags to watch for.
coverageTitles: Kat Courtney from Plant Medicine People - A Deep Dive On Ayahuasca Dietas and Ibogaine, Releasing Guilt Shame and Emotional Pain for Healing with Kat Courtney
